when you get a cheeseburger out of

don't realize how many opportunities

something's happening or you're talking

best advice I've ever gotten is from my

uncomfortable let go or get dress
go get lost keep moving life be showing
don't worry about it there's nothing no

that big in like a week a month a year
you're never going to spend your last

something but why you didn't you could
come up with 2 million reasons not to do
anything but you only need one reason to
do something if you find yourself
thinking something or believing
something think of the opposite and see
if that is just as compelling I say it's
easier to give support than it is to
pick somebody up off the floor my friend
who was in fifth grade with me start
started liking girls I have no idea why
but he asked me if you should ask them
out and I said follow your heart don't
never fit into anyone's M keep
everything positive in your life that

positive circumstances what you perceive
yourself to be you become you may as
well be yourself because all the others
are already
